examples.name: Commander.js
examples.description: JavaScript · the CLI argument parser. Command model, the option parse loop, value resolution, positional arguments, help generation, and error handling.

examples.name: Flask
examples.description: Python · the micro web framework. Application & request lifecycle, routing, the context system, blueprints, sessions, and configuration.

examples.name: Cobra
examples.description: Go · the CLI framework. Command tree, execution & dispatch, lifecycle hooks, flag handling, argument validation, help/usage, and shell completion.
